---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. Load script '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Script Code
If applicable, provide the script code that causes the issue:

```java
// Paste your script code here
```

## Error Messages
If applicable, paste the full error message from console:

```
Paste error message here
```

## Environment
- **Server Software:** (e.g., Paper 1.21.1, Folia 1.21.1)
- **Server Version:** (e.g., 1.21.1-14-529aabc)
- **JavaSkript Version:** (e.g., 1.0.0)
- **Java Version:** (e.g., Java 21)
- **Other Plugins:** (List any relevant plugins)

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here. Screenshots can be helpful.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked the [troubleshooting guide](https://github.com/mukulx/JavaSkript/blob/main/docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md)
- [ ] I have searched for similar issues
- [ ] I am using the latest version of JavaSkript
- [ ] I am using a supported server version (Paper/Folia 1.21.1+)
